verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where would I be If it wasn't for Your kindness toward me You've been closer than a friend could ever be There is nothing on the Earth that could take Your place

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am undone For You see all there was and all that will be Yet you've set your vast affection upon me By Your voice the world was made and still You called my name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who can compare to You Who moves my heart the way You do Who can compare to You Who moves my heart the way You do

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Kingdoms come and kingdoms fade But always You remain Ages pass and seasons change But always You remain the same
